device_name: 7D Surgical System Cranial Biopsy and Ventricular Catheter Placement Application
intended_use: The 7D Surgical System is a stereotaxic image guidance system intended for the spatial positioning and orientation of neurosurgical instruments used by surgeons. The system is also intended to be used
intended_use_full: The 7D Surgical System is a stereotaxic image guidance system intended for the spatial positioning and orientation of neurosurgical instruments used by surgeons. The system is also intended to be used as the primary surgical luminaire during image guided surgery. The device is indicated for cranial surgery where reference to a rigid anatomical structure can be identified.
target_condition: Cranial lesions requiring biopsy or ventricular catheter placement
ground_truth: Physical measurement of ground truth position on phantom models
other_metrics: Target Registration Error (TRE): mean 1.36 mm, standard deviation 0.68 mm, 99% CI upper limit 1.44 mm; Trajectory Angle Error (ATE): mean 1.35°, standard deviation 0.74°, 99% CI upper limit 1.43°
